title: Diplodoc (index.yaml)

title.description: Main heading of the leading page. Supports conditional text items.
title.markdownDescription:
**`string | TextItems`** Main heading displayed at the top of the leading page.

Can be a plain string or a conditional `TextItem` array:
```yaml
title: My Section
```

description.description: Short description shown below the title. Supports conditional text items.
description.markdownDescription: **`string | TextItems`** Short description shown below the title on the leading page.

meta.description: Page metadata (SEO fields, resources, access rules).

title.description: SEO title override (takes precedence over the top-level title).
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** SEO title override (takes precedence over the top-level `title`).

noIndex.description: Adds noindex/nofollow meta tag to prevent search engine indexing.
noIndex.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Prevent search engine indexing of this page.

keywords.description: Keywords for the meta keywords tag.

alternate.description: Alternate language versions of this page.
alternate.markdownDescription: **`Alternate[]`** Alternate language versions of this page.

metadata.description: Custom meta tags (array of {name/property, content} or key-value hash).
metadata.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[]`** Custom meta tags (array of {name/property, content} or key-value hash).

restricted-access.markdownDescription: **`string[][]`** Access restriction rules — same format as frontmatter.

script.description: Script file paths or URLs to include on this page.
script.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Script files to inject on this page only.

style.description: Stylesheet file paths or URLs to include on this page.
style.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Stylesheet files to inject on this page only.

csp.description: Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.
csp.markdownDescription: **`array`** Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.

resources.markdownDescription: **`{script, style, csp}`** Per-page resources (legacy, prefer top-level script/style/csp).

sourcePath.description: Source file path (usually set by the build system).
sourcePath.markdownDescription: **`string`** Source file path (usually set by the build system).

__system.description: System variables from presets (only when addSystemMeta is enabled).
__system.markdownDescription: System variables from presets (only when addSystemMeta is enabled).

__metadata.description: Metadata items from presets (only when addMetadataMeta is enabled).
__metadata.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[]`** Metadata items from presets (only when addMetadataMeta is enabled).

meta.markdownDescription: **`{title, description, noIndex, ...}`** Page metadata — SEO, resources, and access control. Uses the same fields as Markdown frontmatter.

title.description: Title used in the breadcrumb navigation for this section.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Title shown in the breadcrumb navigation for this section (overrides the TOC entry name).

nav.markdownDescription: **`{title}`** Navigation breadcrumb override for this leading page.
nav.description: Breadcrumb / navigation override for this leading page.

description.description: Card description text shown below the title.
description.markdownDescription: **`string`** Card description shown below the title. Supports conditional `TextItems`.

href.markdownDescription: **`string`** Relative path to the target `.md` page or `index.yaml` section.
href.description: Relative path to the target page or section.

when.description: Liquid condition. Card is hidden when false.
when.markdownDescription: **`string | boolean`** Liquid condition — card is hidden when the expression is falsy.

items.markdownDescription: **`{title, description, href, when}`** A navigation link card on the leading page.

links.markdownDescription:
**`object[]`** Navigation link cards shown on the leading page. Each card has a title, optional description, and an `href`.

```yaml
links:
  - title: Quickstart
    description: Up and running in 5 minutes.
    href: quickstart.md
```
links.description: Navigation link cards displayed on the leading page.

TextItems.description: Plain string or array of conditional text items.
TextItems.markdownDescription: **`string | TextItem[]`** Text value — either a plain string or a list of conditional text items (the first item whose `when` condition is truthy is used).

TextItem.description: Conditional text item — the first item whose 'when' is truthy is used.

text.description: Text content to display when the condition is met.
text.markdownDescription: **`string | string[]`** Text content shown when `when` is truthy. **Required.**

when.description: Liquid condition. This item is used when the expression is truthy.
when.markdownDescription: **`string | boolean`** Liquid condition. This item is selected when the expression is truthy.

TextItem.markdownDescription:
**`TextItem`** Conditional text item. The first item in the array whose `when` evaluates to `true` is displayed.

```yaml
title:
  - text: Internal title
    when: env == 'internal'
  - text: Public title
```

Alternate.description: Alternate language version of this page.

MetaItem.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem`** Custom `<meta>` tag — requires `content` plus one of `name`, `property`, or `http-equiv`.

markdownDescription:
Diplodoc leading page file (`index.yaml`).
A leading page is a structured landing page for a documentation section. It can display a title, description, navigation links, and arbitrary page-constructor blocks.
```yaml title: Getting Started description: Learn how to set up and use My Product. links:
  - title: Quickstart
    description: Up and running in 5 minutes.
    href: quickstart.md
  - title: Concepts
    description: Core concepts and architecture.
    href: concepts/index.yaml
```
